parts: This comic opera details the romance between Ralph Rackstraw and Josephine on the title boat, despite her father’s intentions to have her married to another man.
H.M.S. Pinafore was the fourth operatic collaboration between these two men, whose other works include The Mikado and The Pirates of Penzance.

Cousin Hebe in H.M.S. Pinafore is a role for this kind of soprano, which have a sweet timbre and are often placed in comedic or flirtatious roles. Other roles for this type of soprano include Barbarina from The Marriage of Figaro and Dorine from Tartuffe.
